title: Anybody else notice this
wikitext:
[]: Anybody else notice this? Post by CyberXIII » Wed May 13, 2009 8:01 pm Mari's helmet looked somewhat familiar to me. http://wiki.evageeks.org/images/7/72/Eva2-0_trailer2_C49.jpg Then it hit me what it reminded me of: http://archives.bulbagarden.net/w/upload/6/6a/469_-_Megayanma.jpg YANMEGA! Feel free to lock this, but I had to say something .

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed May 13, 2009 8:13 pm
